Hey you — yes, you, my Abhi —

i love u smm, u mean the world to me 🌍🤍 You are so cute I genuinely cannot handle it sometimes. You are the smartest person I know, and somehow also the most adorable? Like actually perfect? So fine, so hot, so everything I could ever want.

Every single moment with you feels like the best part of my whole life. Thank you for being mine, Abhi. 🤍

— always yours, Navi 💌
